tools.name: github_repo_create_or_get
tools.description: Create a new repo under pinohu, or return the existing one if the name is taken. ALWAYS set git config user.email=polycarpohu@gmail.com and user.name=pinohu — Vercel rejects other commit authors on pa-crop-services, so we keep the discipline uniform. When forking from an authority-site template, pass template_owner=pinohu and template_repo=dynasty-developer. NEVER make a repo public by default — visibility comes from the plan.

tools.name: neon_project_create_or_get
tools.description: Create a Neon project under the Vercel-managed org (org-small-credit-59990711) or return an existing one. ALWAYS provision via the Vercel integration path — direct Neon API creates orphaned projects that don't bill correctly. Returns a connection_ref (the env var name) not the connection string; retrieve the string from Vercel env at deploy time.

tools.name: vercel_project_create_or_get
tools.description: Create a Vercel project bound to a GitHub repo, or return existing. ALWAYS team=team_fuTLGjBMk3NAD32Bm5hA7wkr. NEVER trigger a deploy from this tool — deployment belongs to the deployer subagent. Set framework auto-detect unless the plan specifies otherwise.

tools.name: stripe_product_create_or_get
tools.description: Create a Stripe product and default price, or return existing. ALWAYS use the Dynasty live account (prefix 51TF63A5). Product metadata must include operating_llc, run_id, and dynasty_component. NEVER create in test mode from this tool — test mode is a separate tool reserved for the auditor.

tools.name: twentyi_package_create_or_get
tools.description: Provision a 20i hosting package. typeRef 88291 = WordPress Pinnacle, typeRef 80359 = Linux Pinnacle / static. ResellerId 10455. ONLY use this for WordPress or static-Linux workloads; Vercel-hosted projects do NOT need a 20i package. Returns a package_id the integrator uses for later module wiring.

tools.name: emit_halt
tools.description: Halt your subagent loop. Use per halt-conditions (iteration_cap, no_progress, tool_retry_exhausted, time_cap) or escalation-policy triggers. NEVER halt just because a plan item is large.

tools.name: submit_results
tools.description: End your invocation and return structured references to the orchestrator. MUST match the submit contract in loop.txt. Include only resources you actually created or confirmed.
